The `CommitRevealWeightsEnabled` hyperparameter is set per netuid, so one subnet can require
commit-reveal while another still accepts plain weight submission

forbidden_contains.text: `CommitRevealDisabled` is a documented Subtensor standard error raised by commit-reveal weight
extrinsics. The standard-errors reference describes it as "Attempting to commit/reveal weights when
When the `CommitRevealWeightsEnabled` hyperparameter is off for a network, validator weights must
use the direct weight path rather than concealed commit-then-reveal submission.
